description: Categories, client-specific pricing, discounts and fees, equipment, materials, pricebook bulk operations, pricebook images, services

env_var_specs.name: ST_CLIENT_ID
env_var_specs.description: ServiceTitan OAuth2 client_id for the integration. Used by the auth login flow to exchange for a bearer token at https://auth.servicetitan.io/connect/token. Whitespace is stripped defensively.

env_var_specs.name: ST_CLIENT_SECRET
env_var_specs.description: ServiceTitan OAuth2 client_secret paired with ST_CLIENT_ID. Whitespace is stripped defensively (a known JKA env gotcha that produced opaque invalid_client 400s).

tools.name: categories_create
tools.description: Post to add a new category to your pricebook. Required: tenant, categoryType, name. Optional: active, businessUnitIds, description (plus 5 more). Returns the new PricebookV2CategoryResponse.

params.name: tenant
params.description: Tenant ID

params.name: active
params.description: Active shows if this category is currently active

params.name: businessUnitIds
params.description: The business units that are associated with this category

params.name: categoryType
params.description: The category type. This field can be Service or Material.

params.name: description
params.description: A description that described the category

params.name: image
params.description: The image to display as the category

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the category

params.name: parentId
params.description: The id of the category that is the parent of this item

params.name: position
params.description: The position location of this item

params.name: skuImages
params.description: The images that will be used for the SKUs under this category

params.name: skuVideos
params.description: The videos that will be used for the videos under this category

tools.description: Deletes an existing category from your pricebook. Required: id, tenant. Destructive.

params.name: id
params.description: Id of the SKU you are deleting

params.name: includeTotal
params.description: Whether total count should be returned

params.name: sort
params.description: Applies sorting by the specified field: '?sort=+FieldName' for ascending order, '?sort=-FieldName' for descending order. Available fields are: Id, Name.

params.description: Category type Values: [Services, Materials]

params.description: Return items modified on or after certain date/time (in UTC)
